# IKE Build Standards

> Versioned Claude instruction files for IKE projects.
> Modular standards (Maven, Java, IKE-specific) distributed
> as a classified Maven artifact.

## Reports

- [IKE Build Standards](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-build-standards/index.html.md)
- [Project Summary](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-build-standards/summary.html.md)
- [Project Licenses](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-build-standards/licenses.html.md)
- [Maven Coordinates](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-build-standards/dependency-info.html.md)
- [Project Dependency Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-build-standards/dependency-management.html.md)
- [Project Plugins](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-build-standards/plugins.html.md)
- [Project Plugin Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-build-standards/plugin-management.html.md)
- [Project Distribution Management](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-build-standards/distribution-management.html.md)
- [Project Information](https://ike.network/ike-tooling/ike-build-standards/project-info.html.md)
